mapper.select: UPDATE t_outbox_event SET status = 2, attempts = attempts + 1, last_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL WHERE event_id IN ( SELECT event_id FROM t_outbox_event WHERE event_type = 4 AND status IN (1, 4) AND attempts < 5 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) RETURNING event_id, event_type, business_ref_id, tenant_id, payload_json::text AS payload_json, status, attempts, last_error, last_attempt_at, confirmed_at
mapper.update: UPDATE t_outbox_event SET status = 3, confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error = NULL WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND event_type = 4
UPDATE t_outbox_event SET status = 4, last_error = #{lastError}, last_attempt_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND event_type = 4
